use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in hero sections or landing pages
Interactive button triggers for navigation or form submissions
Visual CTA elements for SaaS product interfaces
Engaging action buttons for e-commerce checkout flows
ai_summary: A visually striking button component featuring a hover-triggered glow effect with sliding text animation. The button displays 'HIMAWARI' text with a sophisticated reveal animation on hover, creating an engaging interactive element. Ideal for modern web interfaces requiring eye-catching CTAs that draw user attention through subtle motion and luminous styling.
